numEpochs.label: Number of Epochs
numEpochs.description: Number of epochs for training the model.

train_patch_size.label: Patch Size for training
train_patch_size.description: Patch size for training the model.

test_patch_size.label: Patch Size for predict
test_patch_size.description: Patch size for inference from the model.

train_batch_size.label: Batch Size for training
train_batch_size.description: Batch size for training the model.

test_slice_batch_size.label: Batch Size for Slicing
test_slice_batch_size.description: For big images, we slice the images, and this parameter determines how many slices are sent to the model at once

checkpoint.label: Weights Path
checkpoint.description: Path where the weights are located on the backend machine.

num_queries.label: Num of Queries
num_queries.description: num_queries for the Grounding DINO model.

max_per_img.label: Max objects per image
max_per_img.description: Total max objects per image. Ideally set it same as num_quries.

train_num_workers.label: Num of workers per gpu
train_num_workers.description: The pytorch workers are responsible for loading images for CPU

train_persistent_workers.label: Persistant Workers
train_persistent_workers.description: Whether to pin the threads to the particular process
